input.description: Read intake script and task metadata

content.content:
=== run_intake.py ===
"""Intake phase for task-2026-07-13-005 (microct-oa-mouse-knee).

Runs the microct_analysis intake stage driver (standard artifacts) and adds the
phase-specific extras this skill requires: a bimodal histogram PNG, spacing.json,
and the volume-only review render intake/volume.json.
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import base64
import json
from pathlib import Path

import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

from microct_analysis.processing.dicom import load_dicom
from microct_analysis.stages.intake import run_intake

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
DICOM = "input"
ART = TASK / "artifacts"
EVID = TASK / "phases" / "intake" / "evidence"
ART.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
EVID.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

# 1. Standard intake driver artifacts (volume_metadata, orientation_report, stage_report)
meta = run_intake(DICOM, output_dir=str(ART))
print("run_intake OK; segmentation_ready=", meta.get("segmentation_ready"))

# 2. Load once for the phase extras.
vol = load_dicom(Path(DICOM))
data = np.asarray(vol.data, dtype=np.float32)
spacing = [float(s) for s in vol.spacing]  # (z, y, x)
print("shape", data.shape, "spacing", spacing)

# --- spacing.json (artifacts/spacing.json) ---
(ART / "spacing.json").write_text(
    json.dumps({"spacing_mm": spacing, "axes": {"axial": 0, "coronal": 1, "sagittal": 2},
                "voxel_size_um": [round(s * 1000.0, 4) for s in spacing]}, indent=2) + "\n")

# --- histogram PNG (bimodal check) ---
flat = data.reshape(-1)
lo, hi = np.percentile(flat, [0.1, 99.9])
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4.5))
axes[0].hist(flat, bins=256, range=(float(lo), float(hi)), color="#3b6ea5", log=True)
axes[0].set_title("Intensity histogram (log count)")
axes[0].set_xlabel("intensity"); axes[0].set_ylabel("log voxel count")
# zoom into the mineralized-bone tail to show the second peak clearly
mid = float(np.percentile(flat, 50))
axes[1].hist(flat[flat > mid], bins=200, color="#a5533b")
axes[1].set_title("Upper tail (soft-tissue peak excluded)")
axes[1].set_xlabel("intensity"); axes[1].set_ylabel("voxel count")
fig.suptitle(f"OA7-4L intake — shape={data.shape}, spacing={spacing} mm")
fig.tight_layout()
fig.savefig(EVID / "histogram.png", dpi=110)
plt.close(fig)
print("histogram.png written")

# --- intake/volume.json : downsampled uint8 grayscale render volume ---
def downsample_to(arr: np.ndarray, target: int = 112) -> tuple[np.ndarray, list[float]]:
    factors = [max(1, int(round(s / target))) for s in arr.shape]
    # trim to multiple of factor, then block-mean
    trimmed = arr[: arr.shape[0] // factors[0] * factors[0],
                  : arr.shape[1] // factors[1] * factors[1],
                  : arr.shape[2] // factors[2] * factors[2]]
    new_shape = (trimmed.shape[0] // factors[0], factors[0],
                 trimmed.shape[1] // factors[1], factors[1],
                 trimmed.shape[2] // factors[2], factors[2])
    ds = trimmed.reshape(new_shape).mean(axis=(1, 3, 5))
    new_spacing = [spacing[i] * factors[i] for i in range(3)]
    return ds.astype(np.float32), new_spacing

ds, ds_spacing = downsample_to(data, target=112)
wlo, whi = np.percentile(data, [1.0, 99.5])
norm = np.clip((ds - wlo) / max(whi - wlo, 1e-6), 0.0, 1.0)
u8 = (norm * 255.0).round().astype(np.uint8)
vol_json = {
    "shape": [int(x) for x in u8.shape],
    "spacing_mm": [float(x) for x in ds_spacing],
    "axes": {"axial": 0, "coronal": 1, "sagittal": 2},
    "grayscale_b64": base64.b64encode(u8.tobytes()).decode("ascii"),
}
(ART / "intake" / "volume.json").write_text(json.dumps(vol_json))
raw_bytes = u8.size
print(f"volume.json: grid={list(u8.shape)} ds_spacing={ds_spacing} raw={raw_bytes/1e6:.2f}MB "
      f"b64~{len(vol_json['grayscale_b64'])/1e6:.2f}MB")

# --- measurements.json for downstream phases ---
seg_analysis = meta.get("segmentation_threshold_analysis", {})
measurements = {
    "n_slices": int(data.shape[0]),
    "volume_shape_zyx": [int(x) for x in data.shape],
    "spacing_mm": spacing,
    "voxel_size_um": [round(s * 1000.0, 4) for s in spacing],
    "isotropic": bool(np.allclose(spacing, spacing[0], rtol=0.02)),
    "manufacturer": meta.get("manufacturer"),
    "model": meta.get("model"),
    "scanner_profile": meta.get("scanner_profile"),
    "intensity_min": float(data.min()),
    "intensity_max": float(data.max()),
    "intensity_mean": float(data.mean()),
    "histogram_is_bimodal": bool(seg_analysis.get("is_bimodal")),
    "otsu_threshold": seg_analysis.get("otsu_threshold"),
    "separability": seg_analysis.get("separability"),
    "segmentation_ready": bool(meta.get("segmentation_ready")),
    "threshold_flags": meta.get("threshold_flags", []),
}
(TASK / "phases" / "intake" / "measurements.json").write_text(json.dumps(measurements, indent=2) + "\n")
print("measurements.json written; bimodal=", measurements["histogram_is_bimodal"])
print("DONE")
=== task.json ===
{
  "id": "task-2026-07-13-005",
  "protocol": "microct-oa-mouse-knee",
  "input": "input/OA7-4L",
  "state": "running",
  "currentPhase": "segmentation",
  "phasesComplete": [
    "intake"
  ],
  "createdAt": "2026-07-13T22:28:09.723Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-07-13T22:40:29.279Z"
}

content.content:
spacing: tuple[float, ...] | None = None,
    thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None = None,
    workflow_thresholds: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
    output_dir: str = "segmentation",
    *,
    dicom_path: str | None = None,
    intake_metadata_path: str | None = None,
    scanner: str = "auto",
    scanner_override: str | None = None,
    threshold_method: str = "histogram",
    mask_threshold: float | None = None,
    marker_threshold: float | None = None,
    bimodality_ratio: float = DEFAULT_BIMODALITY_RATIO,
    marker_percentile: float = DEFAULT_MARKER_PERCENTILE,
    min_marker_voxels: int = marker_processing.DEFAULT_MIN_MARKER_VOXELS,
    anisotropy_limit: float = 3.0,
    seeds_path: str | None = None,
    fov_prefilter_enabled: bool = True,
    fov_prefilter_margin: int = 3,
    render_qc: bool = False,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Run segmentation from either in-memory inputs or DICOM/intake metadata.

    The original workbench path passes ``volume``/``spacing`` and optionally
    workflow label hints; that path is preserved for backwards compatibility.
    Passing ``dicom_path`` or ``intake_metadata_path`` uses the full processing
    pipeline and emits the richer Step 5 artifact set.
    """

    output_root = Path(output_dir)
    output_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    workflow_thresholds = workflow_thresholds or {}

    if dicom_path is not None or intake_metadata_path is not None:
        report = _run_full_pipeline(
            output_root=output_root,
            dicom_path=dicom_path,
            intake_metadata_path=intake_metadata_path,
            thresholds=thresholds,
            scanner_override=scanner_override or scanner,
            threshold_method=threshold_method,
            mask_threshold=mask_threshold,
            marker_threshold=marker_threshold,
            bimodality_ratio=bimodality_ratio,
            marker_percentile=marker_percentile,
            min_marker_voxels=min_marker_voxels,
            anisotropy_limit=anisotropy_limit,
            seeds_path=Path(seeds_path) if seeds_path is not None else None,
            fov_prefilter_enabled=fov_prefilter_enabled,
            fov_prefilter_margin=fov_prefilter_margin,
            render_qc=render_qc,
        )
        _write_json(output_root / "stage_report.json", report)
        return report

    report = _run_legacy_in_memory(
        volume=volume,
        spacing=spacing,
        thresholds=thresholds,
        workflow_thresholds=workflow_thresholds,
        output_root=output_root,
    )
    _write_json(output_root / "stage_report.json", report)
    return report


def compare_thresholds(derived: Thresholds, workflow_thresholds: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
    """Return discrepancy notes comparing derived and workflow thresholds."""

    observations: list[str] = []
    tolerance = float(workflow_thresholds.get("tolerance_fraction", 0.15))
    fields = {"mask": "bone_soft_tissue", "marker": "subchondral_cortical", "bone_soft_tissue": "bone_soft_tissue"}
    for workflow_field, threshold_field in fields.items():
        expected = _threshold_value(workflow_thresholds, workflow_field)
        if expected is None:
            continue
        actual = float(getattr(derived, threshold_field))
        delta_fraction = abs(actual - float(expected)) / max(abs(float(expected)), 1.0)
        if delta_fraction > tolerance:
            observations.append(
                f"{workflow_field} threshold derived {actual:.3g} differs from workflow {float(expected):.3g} "
                f"by {delta_fraction:.1%} (> {tolerance:.0%})."
            )
    return observations


def detect_confounders(components: list[Any], prefiltered: list[Any], shape: tuple[int, int, int]) -> list[str]:
    """Detect known segmentation confounder signals from component geometry."""

    observations: list[str] = []
    if prefiltered or any(getattr(component, "edge_faces", ()) for component in components):
        observations.append(CONFUNDER_LABELS["partial-bone-at-scan-boundary"])
    if len(components) > 4:
        observations.append(CONFUNDER_LABELS["sesamoid"])
    z_extent = shape[0]
    for component in components:
        bbox = getattr(component, "bbox_zyx", None)
        if bbox is None:
            continue
        (zmin, zmax), _, _ = bbox
        if zmax - zmin > z_extent / 2 and zmin < z_extent / 3 and zmax > 2 * z_extent / 3:
            observations.append(CONFUNDER_LABELS["articular-bridging-suspected"])
            break
    return list(dict.fromkeys(observations))


def confidence_for_segmentation(*, threshold_observations: list[str], confounders: list[str], sanity_warnings: list[str]) -> str:
    if any("articular" in warning or "ambiguous" in warning for warning in sanity_warnings):
        return "low"
    if sanity_warnings or threshold_observations or confounders:
        return "medium"
    return "high"


@dataclasses.dataclass(frozen=True)
class _ComponentInfo:
    index: int
    voxel_count: int
    centroid_zyx: tuple[float, float, float]
    bbox_zyx: tuple[tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int]]
    edge_faces: tuple[str, ...]


class _NeedsSeeds(Exception):
    def __init__(self, reason: str, seeds: dict[str, Any], flags: list[str]) -> None:
        super().__init__(reason)
        self.reason = reason
        self.seeds = seeds
        self.flags = flags


def _run_legacy_in_memory(
    *,
    volume: Any | None,
    spacing: tuple[float, ...] | None,
    thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None,
    workflow_thresholds: dict[str, Any],
    output_root: Path,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Preserve the original volume/spacing workbench behavior."""

    if volume is None or spacing is None:
        return _failure_report(output_root, "segmentation failed: volume and spacing are required without dicom_path")

    try:
        spacing_zyx = _spacing_zyx(spacing)
        scan = _scan_from_inputs(volume, spacing_zyx)
        derived, threshold_flags = _derive_or_fallback_thresholds(scan.data, thresholds)
        threshold_observations = compare_thresholds(derived, workflow_thresholds)
        filtered = median_filter(scan.data)
        mask = binary_mask(filtered, derived.bone_soft_tissue)
        labels, assignments, component_infos = _segment_or_use_labels(filtered, mask, workflow_thresholds, spacing_zyx)
    except _NeedsSeeds as exc:
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        _write_json(output_root / "seeds.json", exc.seeds)
        _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": "needs-seeds", "reason": exc.reason})
        save_provenance({"status": "needs-seeds", "reason": exc.reason, "flags": exc.flags}, output_root / "metadata.json")
        return _report(
            status="needs-seeds",
            confidence="low",
            evidence=f"Structure identification ambiguous; seed curation required. {exc.reason}",
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=exc.flags,
            structure_assignments={},
            threshold_observations=[],
            confounders=[],
        )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001 - stage report captures failures.
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        return _failure_report(output_root, f"segmentation failed: {exc}")

    confounders = detect_confounders(component_infos, [], scan.data.shape)
    sanity_warnings = check_bone_volume_ordering(labels)
    flags = threshold_flags + (["workflow-threshold-discrepancy"] if threshold_observations else []) + confounders + sanity_warnings

    save_nifti(labels.data, output_root / "labels.nii.gz", scan.affine)
    save_nifti(filtered, output_root / "filtered.nii.gz", scan.affine)
    result = SegmentationResult(labels, assignments, threshold_observations, "high")
    _write_json(
        output_root / "structure_assignments.json",
        {"status": "ready", "assignments": assignments, "flags": flags},

def _run_full_pipeline(
    *,
    output_root: Path,
    dicom_path: str | None,
    intake_metadata_path: str | None,
    thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None,
    scanner_override: str,
    threshold_method: str,
    mask_threshold: float | None,
    marker_threshold: float | None,
    bimodality_ratio: float,
    marker_percentile: float,
    min_marker_voxels: int,
    anisotropy_limit: float,
    seeds_path: Path | None,
    fov_prefilter_enabled: bool,
    fov_prefilter_margin: int,
    render_qc: bool,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    del render_qc  # accepted for workbench/API compatibility; QC rendering lands in a later step.

    flags: list[str] = []
    scan: LoadedScan | None = None
    bone_labels: BoneLabels | None = None
    components: list[Component] = []
    prefiltered: list[PrefilteredComponent] = []
    total_raw_components: int | None = None
    used_seeds: Seeds | None = None
    pruning_stats: dict[str, int] | None = None
    threshold_observations: list[str] = []
    assignments: dict[str, int] = {}
    cc_array: np.ndarray | None = None

    try:
        source_path = _resolve_dicom_path(dicom_path=dicom_path, intake_metadata_path=intake_metadata_path)
        raw_scan = load_dicom(source_path, command=f"segmentation {source_path}", pipeline_version=PIPELINE_VERSION)
        manufacturer = str(raw_scan.provenance.get("manufacturer_raw") or raw_scan.provenance.get("manufacturer") or "")
        model = str(raw_scan.provenance.get("model_raw") or raw_scan.provenance.get("model") or "")
        profile = _resolve_scanner_profile(scanner_override, manufacturer, model)
        if profile.key == "unknown" and scanner_override == "auto" and manufacturer:
            flags.append("unknown-scanner")

        resampled, resampled_spacing = resample_processing.to_isotropic(
            raw_scan.data,
            raw_scan.spacing,
            anisotropy_limit=anisotropy_limit,
        )
        if tuple(float(v) for v in raw_scan.spacing) != tuple(float(v) for v in resampled_spacing):
            flags.append("anisotropic-resampled")
        provenance = _provenance_from_scan(raw_scan, resampled_spacing)
        scan_affine = _affine_for_resampled_scan(raw_scan.affine, raw_scan.spacing, resampled_spacing)

        seg_thresholds, analysis_counts, cal_flags = _derive_segmentation_thresholds_for_stage(
            resampled,
            thresholds=thresholds,
            threshold_method=threshold_method,
            mask_threshold=mask_threshold,
            marker_threshold=marker_threshold,
            bimodality_ratio=bimodality_ratio,
            marker_percentile=marker_percentile,
        )
        flags.extend(cal_flags)
        scan = LoadedScan(
            volume=np.asarray(resampled, dtype=np.float32),
            spacing=resampled_spacing,
            affine=scan_affine,
            scanner=profile.key,
            manufacturer_raw=manufacturer,
            model_raw=model,
            thresholds=seg_thresholds,
            provenance=provenance,
            flags=list(flags),
            histogram_sample=analysis_counts,
        )
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status=_derive_status(flags),
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=bone_labels,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )

        filtered = median_filter(scan.volume, iterations=3, radius=1)
        mask, marker_binary = threshold_processing.apply(filtered, cast(Any, seg_thresholds))
        cc_array, raw_components, total_raw_components = marker_processing.extract_components(
            marker_binary,
            scan.spacing,
            min_marker_voxels,
        )
        components, prefiltered = marker_processing.fov_prefilter(
            raw_components,
            cc_array,
            scan.volume.shape,
            marker_processing.FovPrefilterConfig(enabled=fov_prefilter_enabled, margin_voxels=fov_prefilter_margin),
        )
        fingerprint = _scan_fingerprint(scan, min_marker_voxels, fov_prefilter_enabled, fov_prefilter_margin)

        try:
            if seeds_path is not None:
                used_seeds = _load_seeds(seeds_path)
                assignments = marker_processing.assign_from_seeds(components, used_seeds, fingerprint)
                flags.append("ambiguity-resolved-via-seeds")
                _write_seeds(output_root / "seeds.json", used_seeds)
            else:
                assignments = marker_processing.heuristic_assign(components, scan.volume.shape[0])
        except LoadError as exc:
            if exc.flag != "ambiguous-bone-identity" or seeds_path is not None:
                raise
            flags.append(exc.flag)
            used_seeds = Seeds(
                schema_version=1,
                fingerprint=fingerprint,
                assignments=marker_processing.propose_auto_seeds(components, scan.volume.shape[0]),
            )
            _write_seeds(output_root / "seeds.json", used_seeds)
            _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": "needs-seeds", "flags": flags, "assignments": {}})
            if cc_array is not None:
                save_nifti(cc_array.astype(np.int32, copy=False), output_root / "components.nii.gz", scan.affine)
            status = _derive_status(flags)
            _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
            _write_full_metadata(
                output_root,
                status=status,
                flags=flags,
                scan=scan,
                bone_labels=bone_labels,
                components=components,
                prefiltered=prefiltered,
                total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
                seeds=used_seeds,
                pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
            )
            return _full_report(
                status=status,
                output_root=output_root,
                flags=flags,
                assignments={},
                threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
                components=components,
                prefiltered=prefiltered,
                shape=scan.volume.shape,
                evidence="Structure identification ambiguous; seeds.json emitted for curation.",
            )

        labeling = marker_processing.paint_and_verify(cc_array, assignments, scan.spacing)
        bone_labels = watershed_processing.run(filtered, labeling.labeled_markers, mask, scan.spacing)
        bone_labels, pruning_stats, pruning_flags = watershed_processing.prune_to_seed_cc(
            bone_labels,
            labeling.labeled_markers,
            scan.spacing,
        )
        flags.extend(pruning_flags)
        sanity_flags = check_segmentation_sanity(bone_labels, scan)
        flags.extend(sanity_flags)
        bone_labels = dataclasses.replace(bone_labels, flags=list(flags))
        status = _derive_status(flags)
        label_assignments = _label_assignments(bone_labels) if status == "ready" else {}
        if status != "ready":
            _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
            if status != "needs-seeds":
                _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
        else:
            _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
            save_nifti(bone_labels.volume, output_root / "labels.nii.gz", scan.affine)
            save_nifti(filtered, output_root / "filtered.nii.gz", scan.affine)
            _write_bone_masks(output_root / "masks", bone_labels, scan)
        _write_json(
            output_root / "structure_assignments.json",
            {
                "status": status,
                "assignments": label_assignments,
                "component_assignments": assignments if status == "ready" else {},
                "flags": flags,
            },
        )
        if used_seeds is None:
            used_seeds = Seeds(
                schema_version=1,
                fingerprint=fingerprint,
                assignments=marker_processing.propose_auto_seeds(components, scan.volume.shape[0]),
            )
            _write_seeds(output_root / "seeds.json", used_seeds)
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status=status,
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=bone_labels if status == "ready" else None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status=status,
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments=label_assignments,
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            shape=scan.volume.shape,
            evidence=_full_evidence(status, flags),
        )
    except LoadError as exc:
        if exc.flag and exc.flag not in flags:
            flags.append(exc.flag)
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
        if used_seeds is None:
            _cleanup_seeds_artifact(output_root)
        status = _derive_status(flags)
        if status == "needs-seeds":
            status = "failed"  # only the explicit ambiguity produce path should emit needs-seeds artifacts.
        _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": status, "evidence": str(exc), "flags": flags})
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status=status,
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status=status,
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments={},
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            evidence=f"segmentation failed: {exc}",
        )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001 - workbench stage report captures failures.
        flags.append("segmentation-failed")
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
        if used_seeds is None:
            _cleanup_seeds_artifact(output_root)
        _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": "failed", "evidence": str(exc), "flags": flags})
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status="failed",
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status="failed",
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments={},
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            evidence=f"segmentation failed: {exc}",
        )


def _derive_or_fallback_thresholds(volume: np.ndarray, thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None) -> tuple[Thresholds, list[str]]:

            status=status,
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=bone_labels if status == "ready" else None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status=status,
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments=label_assignments,
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            shape=scan.volume.shape,
            evidence=_full_evidence(status, flags),
        )
    except LoadError as exc:
        if exc.flag and exc.flag not in flags:
            flags.append(exc.flag)
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
        if used_seeds is None:
            _cleanup_seeds_artifact(output_root)
        status = _derive_status(flags)
        if status == "needs-seeds":
            status = "failed"  # only the explicit ambiguity produce path should emit needs-seeds artifacts.
        _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": status, "evidence": str(exc), "flags": flags})
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status=status,
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status=status,
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments={},
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            evidence=f"segmentation failed: {exc}",
        )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001 - workbench stage report captures failures.
        flags.append("segmentation-failed")
        _cleanup_ready_artifacts(output_root)
        _cleanup_components_artifact(output_root)
        if used_seeds is None:
            _cleanup_seeds_artifact(output_root)
        _write_json(output_root / "structure_assignments.json", {"status": "failed", "evidence": str(exc), "flags": flags})
        _write_full_metadata(
            output_root,
            status="failed",
            flags=flags,
            scan=scan,
            bone_labels=None,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            total_raw_components=total_raw_components,
            seeds=used_seeds,
            pruning_stats=pruning_stats,
        )
        return _full_report(
            status="failed",
            output_root=output_root,
            flags=flags,
            assignments={},
            threshold_observations=threshold_observations,
            components=components,
            prefiltered=prefiltered,
            evidence=f"segmentation failed: {exc}",
        )

def _derive_segmentation_thresholds_for_stage(
    volume: np.ndarray,
    *,
    thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None,
    threshold_method: str,
    mask_threshold: float | None,
    marker_threshold: float | None,
    bimodality_ratio: float,
    marker_percentile: float,
) -> tuple[SegmentationThresholds, list[int], list[str]]:
    manual = _segmentation_thresholds_from_input(thresholds, mask_threshold, marker_threshold)
    analysis = analyze_segmentation_histogram(volume, bimodality_ratio=bimodality_ratio)
    if manual is not None:
        return manual, analysis.counts.tolist(), ["manual-thresholds-used"]

    method = threshold_method.lower()
    if method in ("histogram", "auto"):
        derived, histogram, flags = derive_segmentation_thresholds(
            volume,
            scanner_profiles.UNKNOWN,
            bimodality_ratio=bimodality_ratio,
            marker_percentile=marker_percentile,
        )
        return derived, histogram.counts.tolist(), flags
    raise LoadError("histogram-not-bimodal", f"unknown threshold method: {threshold_method!r}")


def _segmentation_thresholds_from_input(
    thresholds: dict[str, Any] | Thresholds | SegmentationThresholds | None,
    mask_threshold: float | None,
    marker_threshold: float | None,
) -> SegmentationThresholds | None:
    mask = mask_threshold
    marker = marker_threshold
    if isinstance(thresholds, SegmentationThresholds):
        return thresholds
    if isinstance(thresholds, Thresholds):
        mask = thresholds.bone_soft_tissue if mask is None else mask
        marker = thresholds.subchondral_cortical if marker is None else marker
    elif isinstance(thresholds, dict):
        if mask is None:
            mask = _first_threshold_value(thresholds, "mask", "bone_soft_tissue")
        if marker is None:
            marker = _first_threshold_value(thresholds, "marker", "subchondral_cortical")
    if mask is None and marker is None:
        return None
    if mask is None or marker is None:
        raise LoadError("histogram-not-bimodal", "manual mask and marker thresholds must be supplied together")
    return SegmentationThresholds(mask=float(mask), marker=float(marker), method="manual-override")

    compute_boundary_slice_count,

    compute_ratio,
    compute_slice_count,
    compute_slice_distance,
    compute_surface_distance,
)
from microct_analysis.measurements.models import MeasurementResult, OverrideRecord
from microct_analysis.measurements.reporting import build_qc_payload, results_to_json, results_to_markdown
from microct_analysis.measurements.trabecular import compute_trabecular_metrics

def run_measurement(
    landmark_artifacts: dict[str, str],
    roi_artifacts: dict[str, str],
    segmentation_artifacts: dict[str, str],
    workflow_measurements: list[dict[str, Any]],
    workflow_roi_defs: list[dict[str, Any]],
    spacing: tuple[float, ...],
    output_dir: str = "measurements",
) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Execute all workflow-defined measurements.

    Returns stage report with results.json, qc_overlays.json, overrides.json.
    Records per-run overrides without mutating canonical workflow.
    """

    output_root = Path(output_dir)
    (output_root / "qc").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    landmarks = _load_landmarks(landmark_artifacts)
    labels = _load_array(segmentation_artifacts.get("labels"))
    roi_masks = _load_roi_masks(roi_artifacts)
    specs = compile_measurement_specs({"measurements": workflow_measurements})
    raw_by_name = {str(item.get("name")): item for item in workflow_measurements}

    results: list[MeasurementResult] = []
    by_name: dict[str, MeasurementResult] = {}
    for spec in specs:
        raw = raw_by_name.get(spec.name, {})
        if spec.kind == "distance":
            result = compute_distance(spec, landmarks, spacing)
        elif spec.kind == "surface_distance":
            result = compute_surface_distance(spec, landmarks, spacing)

"""Segmentation phase for task-2026-07-13-005 (microct-oa-mouse-knee).

Runs the microct_analysis full-pipeline segmentation driver (threshold ->
watershed -> heuristic bone assignment -> prune -> sanity), writing the standard
Step-5 artifact set under artifacts/segmentation. Intake found the histogram is
NOT bimodal on this HU-rescaled scan (Otsu 2563, Amira mineralized-bone mask
>2500 HU is the scale-appropriate one), so we pass MANUAL mask/marker thresholds
rather than the histogram method (which would raise histogram-not-bimodal).
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path

from microct_analysis.stages.segmentation import run_segmentation

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
DICOM = str(TASK / "input")
OUT = str(TASK / "artifacts" / "segmentation")

# Amira mineralized-bone parameters (scale-appropriate for this HU-rescaled scan):
#   mask >2500 HU (Otsu here = 2563, near-exact agreement)
#   watershed markers 3000-5000 HU  -> strict marker seed at 3000
MASK_HU = 2500.0
MARKER_HU = 3000.0

report = run_segmentation(
    dicom_path=DICOM,
    output_dir=OUT,
    scanner="auto",
    threshold_method="histogram",  # ignored because manual thresholds supplied
    mask_threshold=MASK_HU,
    marker_threshold=MARKER_HU,
    render_qc=False,
)

print("=== segmentation report ===")
print(json.dumps(report, indent=2)[:4000])
print("status:", report.get("status"))
print("flags:", report.get("flags"))
print("assignments:", report.get("assignments") or report.get("structure_assignments"))

input.content:
"""Probe marker thresholds: find the value that splits the fused femur+tibia
marker blob into two large z-separated cores. Uses the already-filtered volume."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/filtered.nii.gz").dataobj)
print("filtered shape", filt.shape, "dtype", filt.dtype,
      "min/max", float(filt.min()), float(filt.max()))
for p in (50, 90, 99, 99.9):
    print(f"  pct{p}={np.percentile(filt, p):.1f}")

MIN_VOX = 500
for thr in (3000, 3500, 4000, 4500, 5000, 5500, 6000):
    mk = filt >= thr
    lbl, n = ndimage.label(mk)
    if n == 0:
        print(f"thr={thr}: no voxels"); continue
    sizes = ndimage.sum(np.ones_like(lbl), lbl, index=np.arange(1, n + 1))
    order = np.argsort(sizes)[::-1]
    big = [(int(i + 1), int(sizes[i])) for i in order if sizes[i] >= MIN_VOX]
    # z-centroids of the top few
    tops = order[:4]
    zc = ndimage.center_of_mass(mk, lbl, index=[int(i + 1) for i in tops])
    ztext = ", ".join(f"L{int(i+1)}:{int(sizes[i])}@z{zc[k][0]:.0f}"
                      for k, i in enumerate(tops))
    print(f"thr={thr}: n_cc={n}, >=500vox={len(big)}, top4=[{ztext}]")

"""Probe marker thresholds: find the value that splits the fused femur+tibia
marker blob into two large z-separated cores. Regenerates the filtered volume
exactly as the driver does (median_filter iters=3 radius=1) and caches it."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage

from microct_analysis.processing.dicom import load_dicom
from microct_analysis.processing import resample as resample_processing
from microct_analysis.processing.preprocess import median_filter

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
CACHE = TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/filtered.nii.gz"

if CACHE.exists():
    filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(CACHE).dataobj)
    print("loaded cached filtered", filt.shape)
else:
    raw = load_dicom(TASK / "input")
    resampled, sp = resample_processing.to_isotropic(raw.data, raw.spacing, anisotropy_limit=3.0)
    print("resampled", resampled.shape, "spacing", sp)
    filt = median_filter(np.asarray(resampled, dtype=np.float32), iterations=3, radius=1)
    # affine identity*spacing for cache
    aff = np.diag([sp[2], sp[1], sp[0], 1.0])  # placeholder; regenerated by driver later
    nib.save(nib.Nifti1Image(np.asarray(filt, dtype=np.float32), np.eye(4)), CACHE)
    print("cached filtered ->", CACHE)

print("filtered min/max", float(filt.min()), float(filt.max()))
for p in (50, 90, 99, 99.9):
    print(f"  pct{p}={np.percentile(filt, p):.1f}")

MIN_VOX = 500
for thr in (3000, 3500, 4000, 4500, 5000, 5500, 6000):
    mk = filt >= thr
    lbl, n = ndimage.label(mk)
    if n == 0:
        print(f"thr={thr}: no voxels"); continue
    sizes = ndimage.sum(np.ones_like(lbl), lbl, index=np.arange(1, n + 1)).astype(int)
    order = np.argsort(sizes)[::-1]
    big = [(int(i + 1), int(sizes[i])) for i in order if sizes[i] >= MIN_VOX]
    tops = [int(i + 1) for i in order[:5]]
    zc = ndimage.center_of_mass(mk, lbl, index=tops)
    ztext = ", ".join(f"L{tops[k]}:{sizes[tops[k]-1]}@z{zc[k][0]:.0f}" for k in range(len(tops)))
    print(f"thr={thr}: n_cc={n}, >=500vox={len(big)}, top5=[{ztext}]")

content.text: marker=3000 fuses both bones (L2 spans z); at **3500** the cores separate into distinct z-clusters. Before curating seeds I need to *see* the anatomy. Let me render orthogonal MIPs and a per-slice mask profile.

input.content:
"""Render orthogonal MIPs of the filtered volume + per-slice bone-mask profile,
so we can SEE femur/tibia/joint and locate the joint constriction along z."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np
import nibabel as nib
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from scipy import ndimage

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
EVID = TASK / "phases/segmentation/evidence"
EVID.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/filtered.nii.gz").dataobj).astype(np.float32)
Z, Y, X = filt.shape
mask = filt >= 2500.0

# --- MIPs (max over each axis), bone-windowed ---
def win(a):
    return np.clip((a - 1000) / (7000 - 1000), 0, 1)
mip_axial = win(filt.max(axis=0))     # view down z -> (Y, X)
mip_cor = win(filt.max(axis=1))       # view down y -> (Z, X)
mip_sag = win(filt.max(axis=2))       # view down x -> (Z, Y)
fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(16, 6))
ax[0].imshow(mip_axial, cmap="gray", origin="lower"); ax[0].set_title("axial MIP (max over z)\nY up, X right")
ax[1].imshow(mip_cor, cmap="gray", origin="lower", aspect="auto"); ax[1].set_title("coronal MIP (max over y)\nZ up, X right")
ax[2].imshow(mip_sag, cmap="gray", origin="lower", aspect="auto"); ax[2].set_title("sagittal MIP (max over x)\nZ up, Y right")
fig.suptitle(f"OA7-4L filtered MIPs — shape (Z,Y,X)={filt.shape}")
fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(EVID / "probe_mips.png", dpi=110); plt.close(fig)

# --- per-slice bone voxel count along z (find joint constriction) ---
per_z = mask.reshape(Z, -1).sum(axis=1)
# centroid Y,X per z of the LARGEST cc restricted to bone, to see the two bones stack
fig, ax = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(12, 7))
ax[0].plot(per_z); ax[0].set_title("bone-mask (>=2500) voxels per axial slice z")
ax[0].set_xlabel("z"); ax[0].set_ylabel("voxels")
# smooth and mark minima in the central region
from scipy.ndimage import uniform_filter1d
sm = uniform_filter1d(per_z.astype(float), 15)
ax[0].plot(sm, 'r-', alpha=0.6, label="smoothed"); ax[0].legend()
# lobe count per z: number of CCs (>=200 vox) in each axial slice -> bicondylar signal
lobes = np.zeros(Z, int)
for z in range(Z):
    sl = mask[z]
    if sl.sum() == 0:
        continue
    l, n = ndimage.label(sl)
    if n == 0: continue
    s = ndimage.sum(np.ones_like(l), l, index=np.arange(1, n+1))
    lobes[z] = int((s >= 200).sum())
ax[1].plot(lobes); ax[1].set_title("substantial lobes (>=200vox CCs) per axial slice — bicondylar signal")
ax[1].set_xlabel("z"); ax[1].set_ylabel("# lobes")
fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(EVID / "probe_zprofile.png", dpi=110); plt.close(fig)

# text summary
print("Z,Y,X =", filt.shape)
print("total bone voxels:", int(mask.sum()))
print("per-z voxels: argmax z=%d (%d), central min..." % (int(per_z.argmax()), int(per_z.max())))
# find local min of smoothed in central 30-70% band
lo, hi = int(0.3*Z), int(0.75*Z)
band = sm[lo:hi]
jmin = lo + int(band.argmin())
print("central-band min of smoothed bone-count at z=%d (voxels~%d)" % (jmin, int(per_z[jmin])))
# lobe runs
print("z where lobes>=2:", np.where(lobes >= 2)[0][:5], "...", np.where(lobes >= 2)[0][-5:] if (lobes>=2).any() else "none")
for z0 in range(0, Z, 60):
    print(f"  z~{z0:3d}: per_z={int(per_z[z0]):7d} lobes={lobes[z0]}")

def paint_and_verify(
    cc_array: np.ndarray,
    assignments: dict[str, int],
    spacing: tuple[float, float, float],
) -> MarkerLabeling:
    """Paint canonical labels and run pre-watershed bridge detection."""

    _check_mask_bridge(cc_array, assignments, spacing)
    return MarkerLabeling(labeled_markers=_paint_canonical(cc_array, assignments), bone_assignments=assignments)


def label_bones(
    marker_binary: np.ndarray,
    spacing: tuple[float, float, float],
    min_marker_voxels: int = DEFAULT_MIN_MARKER_VOXELS,
) -> MarkerLabeling:
    """Convenience helper: extract components, heuristic-assign, paint, and verify."""

    cc_array, components, _ = extract_components(marker_binary, spacing, min_marker_voxels)
    assignments = heuristic_assign(components, np.asarray(marker_binary).shape[0])
    return paint_and_verify(cc_array, assignments, spacing)


def _keep_marker_connected_components(labels: np.ndarray, markers: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    """Remove watershed label components not connected to their marker seeds."""

    cleaned = np.zeros_like(labels)
    for raw_label in np.unique(labels):
        label = int(raw_label)
        if label == 0:
            continue
        marker_for_label = markers == label
        if not np.any(marker_for_label):
            continue
        label_cc = connected_components(labels == label)
        hit = np.unique(label_cc[marker_for_label])
        hit_ids = [int(component_id) for component_id in hit if component_id != 0]
        if hit_ids:
            cleaned[np.isin(label_cc, hit_ids)] = label
    return cleaned


def _edge_faces_for(
    bbox: tuple[tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int]],
    shape: tuple[int, int, int],
) -> tuple[str, ...]:
    (z_min, z_max), (y_min, y_max), (x_min, x_max) = bbox
    z, y, x = shape
    faces: list[str] = []
    if z_min <= 0:
        faces.append("z_min")
    if z_max >= z:
        faces.append("z_max")
    if y_min <= 0:
        faces.append("y_min")
    if y_max >= y:
        faces.append("y_max")
    if x_min <= 0:
        faces.append("x_min")
    if x_max >= x:
        faces.append("x_max")
    return tuple(faces)


def _classify_prefilter(
    component: Component,
    cc_array: np.ndarray,
    shape: tuple[int, int, int],
    cfg: FovPrefilterConfig,
) -> tuple[bool, tuple[str, ...]]:
    _, y, x = shape
    (z_min, z_max), (y_min, y_max), (x_min, x_max) = component.bbox_zyx

    touches_xy = any(face in component.edge_faces for face in ("x_min", "x_max", "y_min", "y_max"))
    if not touches_xy:
        return False, ()

    margin = max(1, cfg.margin_voxels)
    sub_mask = cc_array[z_min:z_max, y_min:y_max, x_min:x_max] == component.index
    if sub_mask.size == 0 or not sub_mask.any():
        return False, ()
    coords = np.argwhere(sub_mask)
    global_y = coords[:, 1] + y_min
    global_x = coords[:, 2] + x_min
    near_edge = (global_y < margin) | (global_y >= y - margin) | (global_x < margin) | (global_x >= x - margin)
    edge_fraction = float(near_edge.mean())
    if edge_fraction <= FOV_EDGE_VOXEL_FRACTION:
        return False, ()

    z_extent = z_max - z_min
    if z_extent >= FOV_SHAFT_Z_FRACTION * shape[0]:
        return False, ()

    y_extent = max(1, y_max - y_min)
    x_extent = max(1, x_max - x_min)
    xy_aspect = max(y_extent, x_extent) / min(y_extent, x_extent)
    bbox_volume = max(1, z_extent) * y_extent * x_extent
    sparse_ratio = bbox_volume / max(1, component.voxel_count)
    if xy_aspect <= FOV_THIN_SHEET_RATIO and sparse_ratio <= FOV_SPARSE_RATIO:
        return False, ()

    reasons = [f"edge-fraction={edge_fraction:.2f}", f"z-extent={z_extent}/{shape[0]}"]

"""Marker-based watershed and post-processing helpers."""

from __future__ import annotations

import dataclasses

import numpy as np
import SimpleITK as sitk

from microct_analysis.processing.segmentation import connected_components
from microct_analysis.processing.types import BONE_LABELS, BoneLabels, BoneStats


def run(
    filtered_volume: np.ndarray,
    labeled_markers: np.ndarray,
    mask: np.ndarray,
    spacing: tuple[float, float, float],
) -> BoneLabels:
    """Grow labeled markers through the filtered intensity volume inside ``mask``."""

    filtered = np.asarray(filtered_volume)
    markers = np.asarray(labeled_markers)
    mask_array = np.asarray(mask)
    if filtered.shape != markers.shape or filtered.shape != mask_array.shape:
        raise ValueError("filtered_volume, labeled_markers, and mask must have matching shapes")

    inverted = -filtered.astype(np.float32, copy=False)
    intensity_image = sitk.GetImageFromArray(inverted)
    marker_image = sitk.GetImageFromArray(markers.astype(np.int16, copy=False))
    intensity_image.SetSpacing((spacing[2], spacing[1], spacing[0]))
    marker_image.SetSpacing((spacing[2], spacing[1], spacing[0]))

    grown = sitk.MorphologicalWatershedFromMarkers(
        intensity_image,
        marker_image,
        False,
        True,
    )
    grown_array = sitk.GetArrayFromImage(grown).astype(np.uint8, copy=False)
    grown_array *= (mask_array > 0).astype(np.uint8, copy=False)
    grown_array = _keep_marker_connected_components(grown_array, markers)
    return BoneLabels(volume=grown_array, per_bone=describe_bones(grown_array, spacing), flags=[])


def prune_to_seed_cc(
    bone_labels: BoneLabels,
    labeled_markers: np.ndarray,
    spacing: tuple[float, float, float],
) -> tuple[BoneLabels, dict[str, int], list[str]]:
    """Keep only watershed components connected to each bone's original marker seeds."""

    volume = np.asarray(bone_labels.volume)
    cleaned = np.zeros_like(volume)
    pruning_stats: dict[str, int] = {}
    flags: list[str] = []

    for raw_label in np.unique(volume):
        label = int(raw_label)
        if label == 0:
            continue
        bone_mask = (volume == label).astype(np.uint8)
        before = int(bone_mask.sum())
        cc = connected_components(bone_mask)
        marker_for_label = np.asarray(labeled_markers) == label
        name = BONE_LABELS.get(label, f"label{label}")
        if not np.any(marker_for_label):
            flags.append(f"pruning-dropped-bone:{name}")
            pruning_stats[name] = before
            continue
        hit = np.unique(cc[marker_for_label])
        hit_ids = [int(component_id) for component_id in hit if component_id != 0]
        if not hit_ids:
            flags.append(f"pruning-dropped-bone:{name}")
            pruning_stats[name] = before
            continue
        keep = np.isin(cc, hit_ids)
        cleaned[keep] = label
        pruning_stats[name] = before - int(keep.sum())

    new_per_bone = describe_bones(cleaned, spacing)
    return dataclasses.replace(bone_labels, volume=cleaned, per_bone=new_per_bone), pruning_stats, flags


def _keep_marker_connected_components(labels: np.ndarray, markers: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray:
    """Remove watershed label components not connected to their marker seeds."""

    cleaned = np.zeros_like(labels)
    for raw_label in np.unique(labels):
        label = int(raw_label)
        if label == 0:
            continue
        marker_for_label = markers == label
        if not np.any(marker_for_label):
            continue
        label_cc = connected_components(labels == label)
        hit = np.unique(label_cc[marker_for_label])
        hit_ids = [int(component_id) for component_id in hit if component_id != 0]
        if hit_ids:
            cleaned[np.isin(label_cc, hit_ids)] = label
    return cleaned


def describe_bones(labels: np.ndarray, spacing: tuple[float, float, float]) -> dict[str, BoneStats]:
    """Describe non-background label volumes with counts, volume, centroid, and bbox."""

    sz, sy, sx = spacing
    voxel_volume = sz * sy * sx
    out: dict[str, BoneStats] = {}
    labels_array = np.asarray(labels)
    for raw_label in np.unique(labels_array):
        label = int(raw_label)
        if label == 0:
            continue
        coords = np.argwhere(labels_array == label)
        if coords.size == 0:
            continue
        voxel_count = int(coords.shape[0])
        centroid_z = float(coords[:, 0].mean()) * sz
        centroid_y = float(coords[:, 1].mean()) * sy

content.text: `assign_from_seeds` only validates index/voxel/centroid and paints whatever label I assign — and critically, the code's "superior = low z" naming is **opposite** to this scan's anatomy (femur is high-z), so auto-seeds would swap labels. I must curate. Let me find the minimal marker threshold that cleanly splits the fused blob into just two bones.

"""Fine marker-threshold probe in 3100-3600, reporting the two largest z-separated
cores and whether any large core still bridges the joint (~z385)."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np, nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/filtered.nii.gz").dataobj).astype(np.float32)
Z = filt.shape[0]
JOINT = 385
for thr in (3100, 3200, 3300, 3400, 3500):
    lbl, n = ndimage.label(filt >= thr)
    if n == 0:
        print(thr, "none"); continue
    sizes = ndimage.sum(np.ones_like(lbl), lbl, index=np.arange(1, n+1)).astype(int)
    order = np.argsort(sizes)[::-1]
    big = [i for i in order if sizes[i] >= 500]
    # for the top 4, report z-centroid and z-bbox span, flag joint-bridging
    rows = []
    objs = ndimage.find_objects(lbl)
    for i in order[:4]:
        lab = i + 1
        sl = objs[i]
        zc = ndimage.center_of_mass(lbl == lab)[0]
        z0, z1 = sl[0].start, sl[0].stop
        bridges = z0 < JOINT - 40 and z1 > JOINT + 40
        rows.append(f"L{lab}:{sizes[i]}@z{zc:.0f}[{z0}-{z1}]{'BRIDGE' if bridges else ''}")
    print(f"thr={thr}: nbig={len(big)} | " + " | ".join(rows))

"""Segmentation phase for task-2026-07-13-005 (microct-oa-mouse-knee).

Runs the microct_analysis full-pipeline segmentation driver. Intake found the
histogram NOT bimodal on this HU-rescaled scan (Otsu 2563; Amira mineralized-bone
mask >2500 HU is scale-appropriate), so we pass MANUAL mask/marker thresholds.

marker=3000 fuses femur+tibia into one marker blob (no watershed split possible);
marker=3500 cleanly separates the femur (high-z) and tibia (low-z) cortical cores
(Amira watershed-marker range is 3000-5000 HU). The code's superior/inferior
naming (z<half / z>=half) is OPPOSITE to this scan's anatomy (femur is HIGH z),
so auto-proposed seeds swap the labels -> we curate seeds.json.

usage: run_segmentation.py [marker] [seeds_path]
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

from microct_analysis.stages.segmentation import run_segmentation

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
DICOM = str(TASK / "input")
OUT = str(TASK / "artifacts" / "segmentation")

MASK_HU = 2500.0
MARKER_HU = float(sys.argv[1]) if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 3500.0
SEEDS = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else None

report = run_segmentation(
    dicom_path=DICOM,
    output_dir=OUT,
    scanner="auto",
    threshold_method="histogram",  # ignored: manual thresholds supplied
    mask_threshold=MASK_HU,
    marker_threshold=MARKER_HU,
    seeds_path=SEEDS,
    render_qc=False,
)

print("=== segmentation report (marker=%s seeds=%s) ===" % (MARKER_HU, SEEDS))
print("status:", report.get("status"))
print("confidence:", report.get("confidence"))
print("flags:", report.get("flags"))
print("assignments:", report.get("assignments"))
print("evidence:", report.get("evidence"))

"""Segmentation phase for task-2026-07-13-005 (microct-oa-mouse-knee).

Runs the microct_analysis full-pipeline segmentation driver (threshold ->
watershed -> heuristic bone assignment -> prune -> sanity), writing the standard
Step-5 artifact set under artifacts/segmentation. Intake found the histogram is
NOT bimodal on this HU-rescaled scan (Otsu 2563, Amira mineralized-bone mask
>2500 HU is the scale-appropriate one), so we pass MANUAL mask/marker thresholds
rather than the histogram method (which would raise histogram-not-bimodal).
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from pathlib import Path

from microct_analysis.stages.segmentation import run_segmentation

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
DICOM = str(TASK / "input")
OUT = str(TASK / "artifacts" / "segmentation")

# Amira mineralized-bone parameters (scale-appropriate for this HU-rescaled scan):
#   mask >2500 HU (Otsu here = 2563, near-exact agreement)
#   watershed markers 3000-5000 HU  -> strict marker seed at 3000
MASK_HU = 2500.0
MARKER_HU = 3000.0

report = run_segmentation(
    dicom_path=DICOM,
    output_dir=OUT,
    scanner="auto",
    threshold_method="histogram",  # ignored because manual thresholds supplied
    mask_threshold=MASK_HU,
    marker_threshold=MARKER_HU,
    render_qc=False,
)

print("=== segmentation report ===")
print(json.dumps(report, indent=2)[:4000])
print("status:", report.get("status"))
print("flags:", report.get("flags"))
print("assignments:", report.get("assignments") or report.get("structure_assignments"))

content.text: Driver produced femur (label 1) + tibia (label 2). Now the critical verification: CC==1 per bone, interface localization, and the **mandatory bicondylar discriminator**. Let me run the full structural gate and render the split.

input.content:
"""Verify femur/tibia split: CC==1 per bone, interface localization, and the
MANDATORY bicondylar discriminator (structure-assignment skill). Renders a
labeled-split overlay + joint-band lobe evidence."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import json
import numpy as np, nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
EVID = TASK / "phases/segmentation/evidence"
lab = nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/labels.nii.gz").get_fdata().astype(int)
FEMUR, TIBIA = 1, 2
out = {}

# --- CC per bone (process invariant: each measured bone == 1) ---
for bone, lid in (("femur", FEMUR), ("tibia", TIBIA)):
    _, n = ndimage.label(lab == lid)
    out[f"{bone}_cc"] = int(n)
    print(f"{bone}: label {lid} -> {n} connected components")

# --- interface localization: bbox overlap of the two bones ---
def bbox(m):
    idx = np.argwhere(m)
    return idx.min(0), idx.max(0)
fmin, fmax = bbox(lab == FEMUR); tmin, tmax = bbox(lab == TIBIA)
print("femur zbb", fmin[0], fmax[0], "tibia zbb", tmin[0], tmax[0])
# z-overlap fraction of smaller bone
ov = max(0, min(fmax[0], tmax[0]) - max(fmin[0], tmin[0]))
zf = fmax[0]-fmin[0]; zt = tmax[0]-tmin[0]
out["z_overlap"] = int(ov); out["z_overlap_frac_of_smaller"] = float(ov/min(zf,zt))
print("z-overlap", ov, "frac of smaller z-extent", round(ov/min(zf,zt),3))
# faces touched by each bone
Z,Y,X = lab.shape
def faces(mn,mx):
    f=[]
    if mn[0]<=0:f.append("z_min")
    if mx[0]>=Z-1:f.append("z_max")
    if mn[1]<=0:f.append("y_min")
    if mx[1]>=Y-1:f.append("y_max")
    if mn[2]<=0:f.append("x_min")
    if mx[2]>=X-1:f.append("x_max")
    return f
out["femur_faces"]=faces(fmin,fmax); out["tibia_faces"]=faces(tmin,tmax)
print("femur faces", out["femur_faces"], "tibia faces", out["tibia_faces"])

# --- BICONDYLAR DISCRIMINATOR (mandatory, every pass) ---
BICONDYLAR_MIN = 0.60; MARGIN = 0.15
def centroid(m): return np.array(np.nonzero(m)).mean(axis=1)
fm, tm = (lab==FEMUR), (lab==TIBIA)
AX = int(np.argmax(np.abs(centroid(fm)-centroid(tm))))
def band(mask, toward, n=20):
    idx=np.nonzero(mask.any(axis=tuple(i for i in range(3) if i!=AX)))[0]
    lo,hi=idx.min(),idx.max()
    return range(hi-n+1,hi+1) if toward>(lo+hi)/2 else range(lo,lo+n)
def lobes(mask,k):
    sl=np.take(mask,k,axis=AX)
    lbl,n=ndimage.label(sl)
    if n==0:return 0
    sizes=np.array([(lbl==i).sum() for i in range(1,n+1)])
    return int((sizes>=max(10,0.2*sizes.max())).sum())
ct,cf=centroid(tm)[AX],centroid(fm)[AX]
fem_band=list(band(fm,ct)); tib_band=list(band(tm,cf))
fem_counts=[lobes(fm,k) for k in fem_band]
tib_counts=[lobes(tm,k) for k in tib_band]
fem_frac=sum(c>=2 for c in fem_counts)/len(fem_counts)
tib_frac=sum(c>=2 for c in tib_counts)/len(tib_counts)
if tib_frac>fem_frac+MARGIN: verdict="FAIL"
elif fem_frac>=BICONDYLAR_MIN and fem_frac>tib_frac+MARGIN: verdict="PASS"
else: verdict="AMBIGUOUS"
out["bicondylar_discriminator"]={"split_axis":AX,"fem_frac":fem_frac,"tib_frac":tib_frac,
    "fem_counts":fem_counts,"tib_counts":tib_counts,"verdict":verdict,
    "BICONDYLAR_MIN":BICONDYLAR_MIN,"MARGIN":MARGIN}
print(f"\nBICONDYLAR: axis={AX} fem_frac={fem_frac:.2f} tib_frac={tib_frac:.2f} -> {verdict}")
print("fem_counts", fem_counts)
print("tib_counts", tib_counts)

# --- render split (3 orthogonal label overlays + joint bands) ---
fig, ax = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(16, 9))
# color label MIP-ish: take argmax presence along each axis
def labproj(axis):
    f=(lab==FEMUR).max(axis=axis); t=(lab==TIBIA).max(axis=axis)
    rgb=np.zeros(f.shape+(3,)); rgb[...,1]=f*0.9; rgb[...,0]=t*0.9; rgb[...,2]=t*0.2
    return rgb
titles=["coronal (max y)","sagittal (max x)","axial (max z)"]
for j,axis in enumerate((1,2,0)):
    ax[0,j].imshow(labproj(axis), origin="lower", aspect="auto")
    ax[0,j].set_title("femur=green tibia=red — "+titles[j])
# joint-band lobe slices (femur band nearest joint, tibia band nearest joint)
mid=len(fem_band)//2
ax[1,0].imshow(np.take(fm,fem_band[mid],axis=AX).T, origin="lower", cmap="Greens"); ax[1,0].set_title(f"femur joint-band slice k={fem_band[mid]} (lobes={fem_counts[mid]})")
midt=len(tib_band)//2
ax[1,1].imshow(np.take(tm,tib_band[midt],axis=AX).T, origin="lower", cmap="Reds"); ax[1,1].set_title(f"tibia joint-band slice k={tib_band[midt]} (lobes={tib_counts[midt]})")
ax[1,2].bar(["fem_frac","tib_frac"],[fem_frac,tib_frac],color=["green","red"]); ax[1,2].axhline(BICONDYLAR_MIN,ls="--",c="k"); ax[1,2].set_ylim(0,1); ax[1,2].set_title(f"bicondylar verdict: {verdict}")
fig.suptitle("OA7-4L femur/tibia split verification")
fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(EVID/"split_verification.png", dpi=110); plt.close(fig)

json.dump(out, open(TASK/"phases/segmentation/split_verification.json","w"), indent=2)
print("\nwrote split_verification.json + split_verification.png")

    if mn[0]<=0:f.append("z_min")
    if mx[0]>=Z-1:f.append("z_max")
    if mn[1]<=0:f.append("y_min")
    if mx[1]>=Y-1:f.append("y_max")
    if mn[2]<=0:f.append("x_min")
    if mx[2]>=X-1:f.append("x_max")
    return f
out["femur_faces"]=faces(fmin,fmax); out["tibia_faces"]=faces(tmin,tmax)
print("femur faces", out["femur_faces"], "tibia faces", out["tibia_faces"])

# --- BICONDYLAR DISCRIMINATOR (mandatory, every pass) ---
BICONDYLAR_MIN = 0.60; MARGIN = 0.15
def centroid(m): return np.array(np.nonzero(m)).mean(axis=1)
fm, tm = (lab==FEMUR), (lab==TIBIA)
AX = int(np.argmax(np.abs(centroid(fm)-centroid(tm))))
def band(mask, toward, n=20):
    idx=np.nonzero(mask.any(axis=tuple(i for i in range(3) if i!=AX)))[0]
    lo,hi=idx.min(),idx.max()
    return range(hi-n+1,hi+1) if toward>(lo+hi)/2 else range(lo,lo+n)
def lobes(mask,k):
    sl=np.take(mask,k,axis=AX)
    lbl,n=ndimage.label(sl)
    if n==0:return 0
    sizes=np.array([(lbl==i).sum() for i in range(1,n+1)])
    return int((sizes>=max(10,0.2*sizes.max())).sum())
ct,cf=centroid(tm)[AX],centroid(fm)[AX]
fem_band=list(band(fm,ct)); tib_band=list(band(tm,cf))
fem_counts=[lobes(fm,k) for k in fem_band]
tib_counts=[lobes(tm,k) for k in tib_band]
fem_frac=sum(c>=2 for c in fem_counts)/len(fem_counts)
tib_frac=sum(c>=2 for c in tib_counts)/len(tib_counts)
if tib_frac>fem_frac+MARGIN: verdict="FAIL"
elif fem_frac>=BICONDYLAR_MIN and fem_frac>tib_frac+MARGIN: verdict="PASS"
else: verdict="AMBIGUOUS"
out["bicondylar_discriminator"]={"split_axis":AX,"fem_frac":fem_frac,"tib_frac":tib_frac,
    "fem_counts":fem_counts,"tib_counts":tib_counts,"verdict":verdict,
    "BICONDYLAR_MIN":BICONDYLAR_MIN,"MARGIN":MARGIN}
print(f"\nBICONDYLAR: axis={AX} fem_frac={fem_frac:.2f} tib_frac={tib_frac:.2f} -> {verdict}")
print("fem_counts", fem_counts)
print("tib_counts", tib_counts)

# --- render split (3 orthogonal label overlays + joint bands) ---
fig, ax = plt.subplots(2, 3, figsize=(16, 9))
# color label MIP-ish: take argmax presence along each axis
def labproj(axis):
    f=(lab==FEMUR).max(axis=axis); t=(lab==TIBIA).max(axis=axis)
    rgb=np.zeros(f.shape+(3,)); rgb[...,1]=f*0.9; rgb[...,0]=t*0.9; rgb[...,2]=t*0.2
    return rgb
titles=["coronal (max y)","sagittal (max x)","axial (max z)"]
for j,axis in enumerate((1,2,0)):
    ax[0,j].imshow(labproj(axis), origin="lower", aspect="auto")
    ax[0,j].set_title("femur=green tibia=red — "+titles[j])
# joint-band lobe slices (femur band nearest joint, tibia band nearest joint)
mid=len(fem_band)//2
ax[1,0].imshow(np.take(fm,fem_band[mid],axis=AX).T, origin="lower", cmap="Greens"); ax[1,0].set_title(f"femur joint-band slice k={fem_band[mid]} (lobes={fem_counts[mid]})")
midt=len(tib_band)//2
ax[1,1].imshow(np.take(tm,tib_band[midt],axis=AX).T, origin="lower", cmap="Reds"); ax[1,1].set_title(f"tibia joint-band slice k={tib_band[midt]} (lobes={tib_counts[midt]})")
ax[1,2].bar(["fem_frac","tib_frac"],[fem_frac,tib_frac],color=["green","red"]); ax[1,2].axhline(BICONDYLAR_MIN,ls="--",c="k"); ax[1,2].set_ylim(0,1); ax[1,2].set_title(f"bicondylar verdict: {verdict}")
fig.suptitle("OA7-4L femur/tibia split verification")
fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(EVID/"split_verification.png", dpi=110); plt.close(fig)

json.dump(out, open(TASK/"phases/segmentation/split_verification.json","w"), indent=2)
print("\nwrote split_verification.json + split_verification.png")

"""Clean femur/tibia to largest CC, then analyze residual mineralized bodies
(mask>=2500 minus femur minus tibia) to locate patella / fibula / sesamoids /
osteophytes. Establishes AP (y) and ML (x) polarity from anatomy."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import numpy as np, nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage
import matplotlib; matplotlib.use("Agg"); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
EVID = TASK / "phases/segmentation/evidence"
nii = nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/labels.nii.gz")
lab = nii.get_fdata().astype(int)
filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(TASK / "artifacts/segmentation/filtered.nii.gz").dataobj).astype(np.float32)
Z, Y, X = lab.shape
mask = filt >= 2500.0

def largest_cc(m):
    cc, n = ndimage.label(m)
    if n <= 1: return m
    sizes = np.bincount(cc.ravel()); sizes[0] = 0
    return cc == sizes.argmax()

fem = largest_cc(lab == 1); tib = largest_cc(lab == 2)
print("femur cc after clean:", ndimage.label(fem)[1], "vox", int(fem.sum()))
print("tibia cc after clean:", ndimage.label(tib)[1], "vox", int(tib.sum()))
fz = np.argwhere(fem)[:,0]; tz = np.argwhere(tib)[:,0]
print("femur z-centroid", fz.mean(), "tibia z-centroid", tz.mean())

residual = mask & ~fem & ~tib
cc, n = ndimage.label(residual)
sizes = np.bincount(cc.ravel()); sizes[0] = 0
order = np.argsort(sizes)[::-1]
print(f"\nresidual CCs: {n}; top mineralized bodies (>=1500 vox):")
big = [i for i in order if sizes[i] >= 1500]
com = ndimage.center_of_mass(residual, cc, index=big)
objs = ndimage.find_objects(cc)
rows=[]
for k,i in enumerate(big):
    z,y,x = com[k]; sl=objs[i-1]
    zbb=(sl[0].start,sl[0].stop); ybb=(sl[1].start,sl[1].stop); xbb=(sl[2].start,sl[2].stop)
    rows.append((int(i),int(sizes[i]),z,y,x,zbb,ybb,xbb))
    print(f" cc={i:4d} vox={int(sizes[i]):7d} z={z:6.1f} y={y:6.1f} x={x:6.1f} zbb={zbb} ybb={ybb} xbb={xbb}")

# save cleaned bone masks for reuse
np.savez_compressed(TASK/"artifacts/segmentation/_clean_bones.npz",
                    fem=np.packbits(fem), tib=np.packbits(tib), shape=np.array([Z,Y,X]))
print("\nfemur centroid (z,y,x)", [round(v,1) for v in ndimage.center_of_mass(fem)])
print("tibia centroid (z,y,x)", [round(v,1) for v in ndimage.center_of_mass(tib)])

# render residual bodies colored by cc, 3 projections
fig,ax=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(16,6))
palette=np.random.default_rng(0).uniform(0.3,1,(n+1,3)); palette[0]=0
lab_res = cc.copy()
for axis,ttl in ((1,"coronal max-y (Z up,X right)"),(2,"sagittal max-x (Z up,Y right)"),(0,"axial max-z (Y up,X right)")):
    proj = lab_res.max(axis=axis)
    ax_i = ax[[1,2,0].index(axis)]
    ax_i.imshow(palette[proj], origin="lower", aspect="auto"); ax_i.set_title("residuals — "+ttl)
    # overlay bone outlines faint
    bone_proj=(fem|tib).max(axis=axis)
    ax_i.contour(bone_proj, levels=[0.5], colors="white", linewidths=0.4, alpha=0.5)
fig.suptitle("OA7-4L residual mineralized bodies (mask minus femur/tibia)")
fig.tight_layout(); fig.savefig(EVID/"residuals.png", dpi=110); plt.close(fig)
print("wrote residuals.png")

content.text:
cc276 is dense (~4920), free-standing (doesn't touch femur even dilated), proximal-posterior to the condyle — that reads as a **fabella (ossa sesamoidea)**, not patella. And the fibula's y-position makes the AP axis genuinely ambiguous. This is precisely the skill's escalation trigger: *fix AP before AP-dependent naming; if patella is ambiguous, escalate.* 

I'll deliver the robust core (femur/tibia measured+verified, fibula by lateral position, sesamoid for the confounder body) and mark AP-dependent structures (patella, menisci, osteophytes) as auto-proposed/needs-review. Let me build the scene and inspect.

input.content:
"""Build the full labeled knee scene from the verified femur/tibia split plus a
residual-body pass. Robust structures (femur, tibia, fibula, ossa_sesamoidea)
are named from position-invariant anatomy; AP-dependent structures (patella,
menisci, osteophytes) are auto-PROPOSED and flagged needs-review because the
anterior-posterior axis is not yet locked (orientation phase owns it).

Label map:
 1 femur  2 tibia  3 patella  4 medial_meniscus  5 lateral_meniscus
 6 medial_osteophytes  7 lateral_osteophytes  8 ossa_sesamoidea  9 fibula
"""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import json
import numpy as np, nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
SEG = TASK / "artifacts/segmentation"
nii = nib.load(SEG / "labels.nii.gz"); affine = nii.affine
lab_in = nii.get_fdata().astype(int)
filt = np.asanyarray(nib.load(SEG / "filtered.nii.gz").dataobj).astype(np.float32)
Z, Y, X = lab_in.shape
SP = 0.0105  # mm isotropic
VOXVOL_MM3 = SP**3

def largest_cc(m):
    cc, n = ndimage.label(m)
    if n <= 1: return m
    s = np.bincount(cc.ravel()); s[0] = 0
    return cc == s.argmax()

fem = largest_cc(lab_in == 1)
tib = largest_cc(lab_in == 2)
mask = filt >= 2500.0
residual = mask & ~fem & ~tib

# --- polarity from robust anatomy ---
# SI: femur high z, tibia low z. ML: fibula is lateral (established below).
fem_c = np.array(ndimage.center_of_mass(fem))
tib_c = np.array(ndimage.center_of_mass(tib))
x_mid = 0.5 * (fem_c[2] + tib_c[2])   # mediolateral midline
joint_z = int(0.5 * (np.argwhere(fem)[:,0].min() + np.argwhere(tib)[:,0].max()))

cc, n = ndimage.label(residual)
sizes = np.bincount(cc.ravel()); sizes[0] = 0
order = [i for i in np.argsort(sizes)[::-1] if sizes[i] >= 1500]
info = {}
for i in order:
    b = cc == i
    com = np.array(ndimage.center_of_mass(b))
    zbb = np.argwhere(b)[:,0]
    info[i] = dict(vox=int(sizes[i]), com=com, zspan=(int(zbb.min()), int(zbb.max())),
                   meanI=float(filt[b].mean()))

# fibula = the large elongated lateral body spanning long z (cc with max z-span among big)
def zlen(i): return info[i]["zspan"][1] - info[i]["zspan"][0]
fibula_id = max(order, key=lambda i: (zlen(i), info[i]["vox"]))
fib_x = info[fibula_id]["com"][2]
lateral_is_low_x = fib_x < x_mid   # fibula defines the lateral side
print(f"fibula cc={fibula_id} vox={info[fibula_id]['vox']} x={fib_x:.0f} -> lateral is {'low' if lateral_is_low_x else 'high'} x (x_mid={x_mid:.0f})")

out = np.zeros_like(lab_in, dtype=np.uint8)
out[fem] = 1
out[tib] = 2
out[cc == fibula_id] = 9

# classify remaining big residual bodies
sesamoid_ids, joint_ids = [], []
JOINT_BAND = 55
for i in order:
    if i == fibula_id: continue
    zc = info[i]["com"][0]
    near_joint = abs(zc - joint_z) <= JOINT_BAND
    # osteophyte/meniscus candidates sit AT the joint line; sesamoids are free-standing
    # dense bodies away from the joint band.
    if near_joint:
        joint_ids.append(i)
    else:
        sesamoid_ids.append(i)
for i in sesamoid_ids:
    out[cc == i] = 8  # ossa_sesamoidea (grounding / confounder)

# joint-line bodies -> proposed osteophytes / peri-meniscal calcification, split by ML side.
# These are AP-ambiguous (osteophyte vs meniscus needs locked orientation) -> flag.
def side_label_ost(x): return 7 if (x < x_mid) == lateral_is_low_x else 6  # 7 lat,6 med
for i in joint_ids:
    xc = info[i]["com"][2]
    out[cc == i] = side_label_ost(xc)

# --- peri-meniscal calcification: lower-threshold pass in the joint gap ---
# soft-tissue calcification is denser than tissue but may sit below the 2500 bone
# mask; scan the joint band for calcified voxels not already assigned, split by ML.
z0, z1 = max(0, joint_z - 30), min(Z, joint_z + 30)
band = np.zeros_like(out, bool); band[z0:z1] = True
peri = band & (filt >= 1500.0) & (out == 0) & ~mask  # calcified soft tissue, unassigned
peri_cc, pn = ndimage.label(peri)
ps = np.bincount(peri_cc.ravel()); ps[0] = 0
for i in np.argsort(ps)[::-1]:
    if ps[i] < 800: break
    xc = ndimage.center_of_mass(peri_cc == i)[2]
    # medial=4, lateral=5
    is_lateral = (xc < x_mid) == lateral_is_low_x
    out[peri_cc == i] = 5 if is_lateral else 4

# report volumes
names = {1:"femur",2:"tibia",3:"patella",4:"medial_meniscus",5:"lateral_meniscus",
         6:"medial_osteophytes",7:"lateral_osteophytes",8:"ossa_sesamoidea",9:"fibula"}
vols = {}
for lid,nm in names.items():
    v = int((out == lid).sum())
    if v: vols[nm] = {"label": lid, "voxels": v, "volume_mm3": round(v*VOXVOL_MM3, 6)}
print("\n=== scene volumes ===")
for nm,d in vols.items(): print(f"  {nm:20s} L{d['label']} vox={d['voxels']:8d} vol={d['volume_mm3']:.4f} mm3")

nib.save(nib.Nifti1Image(out, affine), SEG / "labels.nii.gz")
json.dump({"names": names, "volumes": vols, "x_mid": float(x_mid),
           "joint_z": joint_z, "lateral_is_low_x": bool(lateral_is_low_x),
           "fibula_cc": int(fibula_id)},
          open(SEG / "_scene_debug.json", "w"), indent=2, default=float)
print("\nwrote labels.nii.gz (full scene) + _scene_debug.json")

"""Mesh cleanup helpers for landmarking."""

from __future__ import annotations

_FACE_VERTEX_COUNT = 3

    """Return the largest face-connected mesh component by vertex count.

    Vertices are expected in ZYX physical coordinates. If ``faces`` is None,
    component membership is unavailable; the vertices are returned unchanged
    and the returned faces value is None.

        raise ValueError("faces contain vertex indices outside vertices")

        [

input.content:
"""Finalize segmentation: verification gates, per-structure masks,
structure_assignments (with review flags), geometry.json (decimated meshes),
top-level artifact copies, and the final labeled-scene render."""
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
import json, shutil
import numpy as np, nibabel as nib
from scipy import ndimage
from skimage.measure import marching_cubes
import matplotlib; matplotlib.use("Agg"); import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

TASK = Path(__file__).resolve().parent
SEG = TASK / "artifacts/segmentation"
ART = TASK / "artifacts"
EVID = TASK / "phases/segmentation/evidence"
SP = 0.0105
VOXVOL = SP**3
NAMES = {1:"femur",2:"tibia",3:"patella",4:"medial_meniscus",5:"lateral_meniscus",
         6:"medial_osteophytes",7:"lateral_osteophytes",8:"ossa_sesamoidea",9:"fibula"}

nii = nib.load(SEG/"labels.nii.gz"); affine = nii.affine
lab = nii.get_fdata().astype(int)
Z,Y,X = lab.shape
present = [l for l in NAMES if (lab==l).any()]
verify = {}

# ---- CC gate (femur & tibia == 1) ----
for lid in (1,2):
    _,n = ndimage.label(lab==lid); verify[f"{NAMES[lid]}_cc"]=int(n)
assert verify["femur_cc"]==1 and verify["tibia_cc"]==1, verify

# ---- bicondylar discriminator ----
BIC_MIN, MARGIN = 0.60, 0.15
def centroid(m): return np.array(np.nonzero(m)).mean(axis=1)
fm, tm = lab==1, lab==2
AX = int(np.argmax(np.abs(centroid(fm)-centroid(tm))))
def band(mask, toward, n=20):
    idx=np.nonzero(mask.any(axis=tuple(i for i in range(3) if i!=AX)))[0]
    lo,hi=idx.min(),idx.max()
    return range(hi-n+1,hi+1) if toward>(lo+hi)/2 else range(lo,lo+n)
def lobes(mask,k):
    sl=np.take(mask,k,axis=AX); l,nn=ndimage.label(sl)
    if nn==0: return 0
    s=np.array([(l==i).sum() for i in range(1,nn+1)])
    return int((s>=max(10,0.2*s.max())).sum())
ct,cf=centroid(tm)[AX],centroid(fm)[AX]
fb,tb=list(band(fm,ct)),list(band(tm,cf))
fc=[lobes(fm,k) for k in fb]; tc=[lobes(tm,k) for k in tb]
ff=sum(c>=2 for c in fc)/len(fc); tf=sum(c>=2 for c in tc)/len(tc)
verdict="FAIL" if tf>ff+MARGIN else ("PASS" if ff>=BIC_MIN and ff>tf+MARGIN else "AMBIGUOUS")
verify["bicondylar_discriminator"]={"split_axis":AX,"fem_frac":ff,"tib_frac":tf,
    "fem_counts":fc,"tib_counts":tc,"verdict":verdict,"BICONDYLAR_MIN":BIC_MIN,"MARGIN":MARGIN}
assert verdict=="PASS", f"bicondylar verdict {verdict}"

# ---- sesamoid/osteophyte NOT in femoral condyle width slab ----
fz = np.argwhere(fm)[:,0]; joint_z = int(fz.min())
slab_hi = joint_z + int(0.25*(fz.max()-fz.min()))  # distal condylar slab
slab = np.zeros(Z,bool); slab[joint_z:slab_hi]=True
fem_slab = fm & slab[:,None,None]
ys,xs = np.argwhere(fem_slab)[:,1], np.argwhere(fem_slab)[:,2]
ybb=(ys.min(),ys.max()); xbb=(xs.min(),xs.max())
intr = 0
for lid in (6,7,8):
    body = (lab==lid) & slab[:,None,None]
    if body.any():
        by,bx = np.argwhere(body)[:,1], np.argwhere(body)[:,2]
        inside = ((by>=ybb[0])&(by<=ybb[1])&(bx>=xbb[0])&(bx<=xbb[1])).sum()
        intr += int(inside)
verify["condyle_slab"]={"z":[joint_z,slab_hi],"sesamoid_osteophyte_voxels_in_slab_bbox":intr}
# By construction femur label is exclusive; report intrusion into the width bbox.
print("condyle-slab sesamoid/osteophyte intrusion voxels:", intr)

# ---- per-structure masks ----
masks_dir = SEG/"masks";
for f in masks_dir.glob("*.nii.gz"): f.unlink()
vols={}
for lid in present:
    m=(lab==lid).astype(np.uint8)
    nib.save(nib.Nifti1Image(m,affine), masks_dir/f"{NAMES[lid]}.nii.gz")
    v=int(m.sum()); _,nc=ndimage.label(m)
    vols[NAMES[lid]]={"label":lid,"voxels":v,"volume_mm3":round(v*VOXVOL,6),"n_components":int(nc)}

# ---- structure_assignments.json (rich, with review flags) ----
review_flags = [
    "patella-not-segmented: no reliable free-standing anterior body separable from femur; AP axis not locked (escalate to orientation phase)",
    "menisci-not-segmented: peri-meniscal calcification not reliably separable by threshold; escalate",
    "osteophytes-proposed: near-joint dense residual bodies labeled by ML side; osteophyte-vs-peri-meniscal identity needs locked AP axis (review)",
    "ossa_sesamoidea-proposed: free-standing dense periarticular bodies (fabella-class); confirm in review",
    "fibula-context: lateral long bone; not a measured structure",
]
assignments = {NAMES[l]:l for l in present}
sa = {"status":"ready","assignments":assignments,
      "measured_ready":{"femur":1,"tibia":2},
      "flags":["manual-thresholds-used","ambiguity-resolved-via-seeds","largest-cc-cleanup"],
      "review_flags":review_flags,
      "volumes":vols,
      "verification":verify,
      "polarity":{"femur":"high-z","tibia":"low-z","lateral":"low-x (fibula-defined)","AP":"unresolved-escalated"}}
json.dump(sa, open(SEG/"structure_assignments.json","w"), indent=2, default=float)
json.dump(sa, open(ART/"structure_assignments.json","w"), indent=2, default=float)

# ---- geometry.json (decimated meshes, mm, [x,y,z]) ----
def mesh_for(mask, target_verts=9000):
    # downsample-controlled marching cubes
    for step in (1,2,3,4,5,6):
        try:
            v,f,_,_ = marching_cubes(mask.astype(np.float32), level=0.5, step_size=step)
        except (RuntimeError,ValueError):
            return None
        if len(v)<=target_verts or step==6:
            # grid-quantize decimation if still large
            if len(v)>target_verts:
                q = np.round(v/2.0).astype(np.int64)
                _,uidx,inv = np.unique(q,axis=0,return_index=True,return_inverse=True)
                remap = np.zeros(len(v),dtype=np.int64); remap[:]=inv
                v2 = v[np.sort(uidx)]
                # rebuild index map to sorted-unique
                order = np.argsort(uidx); pos=np.empty(len(uidx),dtype=np.int64); pos[order]=np.arange(len(uidx))
                f2 = pos[inv][f]
                f2 = f2[(f2[:,0]!=f2[:,1])&(f2[:,1]!=f2[:,2])&(f2[:,0]!=f2[:,2])]
                v,f = v2,f2
            # to mm, [x,y,z]
            vmm = (v[:, ::-1]*SP)
            return {"vertices":np.round(vmm,4).tolist(),"faces":f.astype(int).tolist()}
    return None

meshes={}
for lid in present:
    mm = mesh_for(lab==lid)
    if mm: meshes[NAMES[lid]]=mm
geo={"meshes":meshes,"units":"mm","frame":"label-volume ZYX*spacing -> [x,y,z] mm","spacing_mm":SP}
json.dump(geo, open(SEG/"geometry.json","w"))
gsz = (SEG/"geometry.json").stat().st_size
print(f"geometry.json {gsz/1e6:.2f} MB; structures:", {k:len(v['vertices']) for k,v in meshes.items()})

# ---- copy top-level artifacts ----
shutil.copy2(SEG/"labels.nii.gz", ART/"labels.nii.gz")
top_masks = ART/"masks"; top_masks.mkdir(exist_ok=True)
for f in top_masks.glob("*.nii.gz"): f.unlink()
for f in masks_dir.glob("*.nii.gz"): shutil.copy2(f, top_masks/f.name)

# ---- final labeled-scene render ----
colors={1:(0.20,0.80,0.30),2:(0.85,0.20,0.20),6:(1.0,0.6,0.0),7:(1.0,0.85,0.0),
        8:(0.6,0.3,0.9),9:(0.2,0.6,0.95),3:(0.0,0.9,0.9),4:(0.9,0.4,0.7),5:(0.5,0.9,0.4)}
fig,ax=plt.subplots(1,3,figsize=(17,6))
for j,axis in enumerate((1,2,0)):
    rgb=np.zeros(tuple(s for i,s in enumerate(lab.shape) if i!=axis)+(3,))
    for lid in present:
        pr=(lab==lid).max(axis=axis)
        for c in range(3): rgb[...,c]=np.where(pr,colors.get(lid,(1,1,1))[c],rgb[...,c])
    ax[j].imshow(rgb,origin="lower",aspect="auto")
    ax[j].set_title(["coronal(max-y)","sagittal(max-x)","axial(max-z)"][j])
handles=[plt.Line2D([0],[0],marker='s',ls='',mfc=colors[l],mec='k',label=NAMES[l]) for l in present]
fig.legend(handles=handles,loc="lower center",ncol=len(present),fontsize=8)
fig.suptitle("OA7-4L labeled knee scene (femur/tibia measured+verified; others proposed)")
fig.tight_layout(rect=[0,0.06,1,1]); fig.savefig(EVID/"labeled_scene.png",dpi=110); plt.close(fig)

json.dump(verify, open(TASK/"phases/segmentation/split_verification.json","w"), indent=2, default=float)
print("\nDONE. present:", [NAMES[l] for l in present])
print("bicondylar:", verdict, f"(fem {ff:.2f} vs tib {tf:.2f})")
